title: ViaRestricted
description: It allows you to block certain Minecraft versions (via ViaVersion) and display a custom message to the player.
body:
# **ANY ERRORS ? contact me on discord: .akafashan**
# You can view all version numbers [here](https://cdn.akanoka.fr/akanoka/modrinth/config/viarestricted/config.yaml).
VersionRestrictor is a Minecraft plugin designed to secure and control the versions of clients connecting to your server. It integrates seamlessly with ViaVersion, making it easy to manage compatibility between different Minecraft versions.

# Key Features:

**Version Control**: Only allows players whose Minecraft protocol is listed in the configuration.

**Reliable Version Detection**: Uses ViaVersion to accurately detect the player's version, even when multiple versions share the same protocol.

**Automatic Kick & Customizable Messages**: Players with unsupported versions are kicked with clear, colored messages configurable in config.yml.

**Detailed Logging**: Option to log all kicks in the console for precise monitoring.

# Simple & Flexible Configuration:

Allowed protocols list editable in config.yml.

Supports configuration reload without restarting the server.

Compatible with all ViaVersion-supported versions: Makes managing multi-version servers easy.

# Use Cases:

SMP servers that only want to allow 1.20.x and 1.21.4 clients.

Anarchy or mini-game servers where only certain versions are allowed to avoid version-specific bugs.

# Benefits:

Easy to install and configure.

Reliable thanks to using protocol numbers.

Clear and professional player messages.
